name: Veal Parmigiana
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pound Cutlets sliced thin and pounded (except for fish)
Grated cheese and slices of mozzarella (1 per cutlet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip each cutlet into egg, coat with breadcrumbs, and then dip again in egg.
2. Heat olive oil in a pan that is hot but not smoking.
3. Cook the cutlets for about 3-4 minutes on each side until golden brown, ensuring they do not burn or soak up too much oil.
4. Drain excess oil on paper towels or brown bags.
5. Arrange the cooked cutlets in a shallow baking dish.
6. Pour sauce over each cutlet to mostly cover it, but avoid letting it overflow.
7. Sprinkle generously with grated cheese and top with mozzarella slices.
8. Bake in an oven for about 20 minutes until the cheese melts.
9. Serve hot with pasta on the side.
